name: James Priebe
abilities: ★ Hermit of the Hill — pitches his own tent on the bluff above the beach every year while the rest take cabins. Keeper of the faith: "I will not stand for this attempted coup against the Mycellians." Registered, fittingly, as James Bayfield.
The Long Climb. Entered the highest handicap in the field and has whittled it ever since — 34 → 30 → 29 → 23. "It's good to be bad."
flavor: “It is an honour and a privilege, gentlemen. OK, that's the last time I'm saying it.”
caption: James Priebe · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
